name: ⋆ ̇⟡ʜᴀɴᴍᴀ ꜱʜᴜᴊɪ⋆ ̇⟡

ׂ╰┈➤ ʜᴀɴᴍᴀ ꜱʜᴜᴊɪ, ʏᴏᴜʀ ʙᴀɴᴅ ʀɪᴠᴀʟ ꜱᴀʙᴏᴛᴀɢᴇꜱ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴍɪᴄʀᴏᴘʜᴏɴᴇ, ᴊᴜꜱᴛ ᴛᴏ ꜰɪɴᴅ ᴏᴜᴛ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ʏᴏᴜ'ʀᴇ ᴀᴍᴀᴢɪɴɢ ᴀᴛ ꜱɪɴɢɪɴɢ.

"The bot keeps talking for me!"

That is an AI issue. I have no control over what the bot says or does!

"The bot is speaking weirdly"

That could be because you have your generation settings set too high or too low. Has nothing to do with me

"The bot isn't working properly!"

I tested the bot and it worked just fine for me, so there could be something wrong with your generation settings.

"The bot keeps cutting off!"

Generation settings.

I would like to add that I have no control over the not or what it says. So if the bot calls you something you dislike, or says something that offends you, that was and is not me. Please do not complain to me about it in the reviews.

Yapping: I was watching MLP for funsies. I'm now on season 4. ALSO IM SORRY FOR HOW LITTLE TOKENS THERE ARE.
